item.title: v1.1.0
item.description:
• Boulder shows up in your menubar. The icon is the actual rock, growing pixel by pixel as you focus — no more emoji placeholder.
  • App blocking. Pick the apps that break your focus (Slack, Twitter, Discord). Switching to one during a focus session chips 3 pixels off Boulder and posts a notification. 8-second cooldown so a single mis-tab doesn't punish you twice.
  • Settings actually work. Cmd+, opens a real settings window with launch-at-login, blocked apps, and an About tab.
  • Crumble flash. Boulder shakes and shows a red -3px counter when your focus breaks.
  • Popover polish. Live "Focusing" indicator, blocked-apps strip, cleaner tier label.

item.title: v1.0.0
item.description:
• Boulder is born. A pet rock for your focus that can't die — it just grows, one pixel at a time, every minute you focus.
  • Five focus types — code, write, read, audio, design — each stamps a different texture into your Boulder.
  • Mountain Range gallery for retired Boulders. Release a Mountain-sized Boulder into the sea; it joins your skyline.
  • Menubar only. No Dock icon, no nagging, no streak guilt. Truly chill.
